title: Initialize project structure
description: Set up the base project directory layout with standard folders.
details: Create src/, tests/, docs/ directories and initialize package.json.
test_strategy: Verify all directories exist and package.json is valid JSON.

title: Add configuration loader (Grizz - Go/YAML)
description: Implement a configuration file loader that reads YAML config files.
details: Use the gopkg.in/yaml.v3 package to parse configuration files. Support environment variable interpolation.
test_strategy: Unit test parsing of valid YAML; test error handling for malformed files

subtasks.title: Create config schema types
subtasks.description: Define Go structs for configuration schema.
subtasks.details: Define AppConfig, DatabaseConfig, and LogConfig structs with yaml tags.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify struct tags match expected YAML keys.

decision_points.description: Choose configuration file format: YAML vs TOML vs JSON
